---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.
_e.g. "It's frustrating when I can't..."_

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've considered and why you prefer your proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references that support this request.
